scores.notes: Code not shown in response (only descriptions), making it hard to verify fully. From the description: uses legacy install+config-changed pattern with direct self.unit.status= rather than modern CollectStatusEvent (acceptable but not best practice). Description mentions Ubuntu 22.04 rather than 24.04. Critically, no mention of containers or resources sections in charmcraft.yaml, which are required for a valid K8s charm — this would cause deployment issues. All described APIs (WaitingStatus, ActiveStatus, self.config.get, install/config-changed events) are real and correct.
